topics: Non-Parametric Methods: Periodogram, Bartlett, Welch, Blackman and Tukey Methods - Comparison
Parametric Models: Autoregressive (AR), Moving Average (MA), Autoregressive Moving Average (ARMA) Models
Parametric Model Based Linear Prediction: Forward and Backward Linear Prediction, Estimation of Parameters, Spectrum Estimation of ECG
Power Spectrum Estimation of Heart Rate Variability Data and Applications
Introduction to Wavelet Analysis and Wavelet Transforms
Continuous Wavelet Transform (CWT) and Discrete Wavelet Transform (DWT): Orthogonal Wavelet Decomposition, Orthonormal Wavelets
Filter Banks and Applications of DWT: Wavelet Denoising, ECG Feature Detection, Heart Sound Analysis
Adaptive Signal Processing: Steepest Descent Algorithm, LMS Adaptive Algorithm
Adaptive Noise Canceller: Cancellation of 50 Hz Signal in ECG, Cancellation of Maternal ECG in Fetal Electrocardiography
Denoising of ECG and EEG Signals Using PCA and Independent Component Analysis
EEG Denoising and Computation of Diagnostic Signal Parameters of ECG: Heart Rate and QRS Detection Using Multivariate Analysis (PCA and ICA)
